goal: Create or refresh a concise project code map before implementation.

task_template.title: Create or refresh project code map
task_template.description: Map relevant entry points, modules, state/config surfaces, and verification commands before implementation work.

doc.summary: Maintain a compact code map that agents can consult before related changes.
doc.scope: Only map surfaces relevant to the active development task.
doc.plan: Inspect existing map, inspect touched paths, update or create a compact map, then verify the map names the relevant checks.
doc.verify_steps: Confirm one code-map artifact exists and contains paths or commands relevant to the active task.
doc.rollback_plan: Revert only the code-map sections created for the active task if they prove inaccurate.

target_paths.description: Paths, modules, or runtime surfaces that need to be mapped.

code_map_path.description: The code-map artifact path used or created.

mapped_surfaces.description: Entry points, modules, config files, or verification commands added to the map.

verification_commands.description: Commands named in the map for this task.

steps.summary: Record relevant entry points, modules, state/config surfaces, and checks.
Compare the implementation plan with the map and update only stale sections.
